description: A listing has been on the market for 30 days. The agent needs to provide the seller with a market activity update.

nodes.task_description: Gather statistics for the listing: online views, number of showings, and any feedback received.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent compiles all relevant activity data for the property.

nodes.task_description: Research any new comparable listings or sales in the area since the property was listed.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds new market data that might affect the listing.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report summarizing the activity and new market data, and recommend a strategy, such as a price reduction.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a comprehensive report and provides a data-driven recommendation.
